info.title: ArchiveBox API
info.description: ArchiveBox is a self-hosted web archiving solution. The REST API (v1 ALPHA) provides programmatic access to manage snapshots, archive results, tags, crawls, CLI commands, and machine/binary information. Built with Django Ninja.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all snapshots matching the filter criteria.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by URL, title, tags, or ID

post.description: Creates a new snapshot of the given URL.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of archive results.

get.summary: Get an archive result by ID
get.description: Get an archive result by ID

get.summary: Export tag snapshot URLs as text
get.description: Export tag snapshot URLs as text

post.description: Add new URLs to the archive via the CLI interface.
Re-archive URLs that have already been added.
Authenticate with username/password and retrieve an API token.

post.description: Check if an API token is valid

bearerAuth.description: API token authentication. Get a token via POST /api/v1/auth/get_api_token.
